examples: But he did not know what malevolence was.
Clone pilot Broadside was last seen in the Season one episode "Shadow of Malevolence".
What malevolence you must have to wish to convince me that there is no happiness in the world!
We aren't exactly what we eat, but not eating enough can make for malevolence.
It's a malevolence so ancient there are no new words for it, and so the old ones will have to do.
